sections.paragraph:
Original: קליה

Transliteration: qêlâyâh

Phonetic: kay-law-yaw'

BDB Definition:

Kelaiah = "Jehovah has dishonoured"
  1. a Levite who had a foreign wife in the time of Ezra
    1. also 'Kelita'

Origin: from H7034

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
